calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-15-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-17-2023 Continued To Nov-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Peter Bresler, via Zoom, for Jen Y. Eng, Personal Representative.

Counsel offers an update regarding the outstanding issues as presented by the Examiner specifically the creditors claim, whether the estate funds are fully insured in bank accounts, and the amount of estate funds. Counsel reports of a Declaration that is pending in the court's e-filing queue and that distributions are ready to be completed.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Nov-15-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cabrera. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-26-2023 Continued To Oct-17-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared via zoom for and with Jen Eng (administrator).

The Court issues sanctions in the amount of $250.00 against Peter Bresler Pursuant to CCP 128 payable within 10 days of the order.

The Court stated that Ms. Eng doesn't need a court order to pay back the funeral expenses paid by her sister. Order to appear is ordered off calendar. First and final report of administrator is continued to October 17, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cabrera. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-26-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-12-2023 Continued To Sep-26-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Peter Bresler (attorney) to appear on September 26, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 per CCP 128 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. An Order to Appear will be issued to Jen Yez Eng (petitioner) to appear on September 26, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. First and final report administrator on waiver of account is also continued to that date.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-01-2023 Continued To Sep-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-20-2023 Continued To Aug-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-08-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-24-2023 Continued To May-08-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared by zoom for Jen Yez Eng (Petitioner).

The Court asked why a petition for final distribution has not been filed. Mr. Bresler stated that it is filed. The clerk confirmed that a petition is pending in the e-file queue. Mr. Bresler is to double check to make sure it doesn't get rejected. Status on close of estate is continued to May 08, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-13-2023 Continued To Apr-24-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared by zoom for Jen Eng (administrator).

Mr. Bresler stated that a status report is in the e-file queue, that the robinhood account turned out to be $20.00, and that he can cancel the pending status report and file a final petition within 10-days. Mr. Bresler was advised to contact the e-file supervisor prior to the status report being given a hearing date. Status on close of estate is continued to April 24, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-19-2022 Continued To Mar-13-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler, via Zoom, for Jen Y. Eng, Personal Representative.

The court queries counsel as to the status of an Inventory and Appraisal (I&A). Counsel reports that his client has been working on obtaining records from Robinhood which is an online investment and trading company but that the process has been slow. The court suggests continuing this matter for eight (8) weeks, but counsel will be expected to file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration two (2) weeks prior. Counsel agrees to the preceding.

The subject matter is continued to Mar-13-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file either of the petitions mentioned above by Feb-27-2023.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-06-2021 Granted Per Written Order
